title: KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender - 2 Speed Settings - Pulse Setting - 50ml Measuring Cup - Plastic Jug - White - E5015WH
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 2 SPEED SETTINGS: Pressing 1 will operate the motor continuously at a low/medium rate. Pressing 2 will operate the motor continuously at the maximum rate for a finer blend
PULSE FUNCTION BUTTON: Press the pulse function to operate the motor in short bursts. The motor will only operate for the duration that the pulse button is pressed.
STAINLESS STEEL BLADES: The stainless steel blades rotate rapidly to finely chop and blend ingredients into a smooth liquid texture.
RUBBER SUCTION FEET: The feet will stick to the kitchen surface to ensure that the blender is sturdy and will stay in place during operation.
description: The KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender is perfect for any kitchen. With 2 speed settings it is suitable for lots of different ingredients. It also has a pulse function button which provides short, powerful bursts if this is what is required. The blades are stainless steel, these rotate rapidly to finely chop and blend ingredients in to a smooth liquid texture. A 50ml measuring cup is also included, this sits in the top of the removable lid. This is great for accurately measuring liquids before adding them to the jug. Rubber suction feet provide grip, they will stick to the kitchen surface to ensure the blender stays in place whilst in operation. Box Includes: 1 KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender Plastic Jug with Lid Instruction Manual
